jobs.title: Senior React Developer
jobs.description: Build accessible UIs with React 19, Redux Toolkit, and REST integrations. Experience with design systems preferred.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Ship customer-facing features in React and TypeScript. Collaborate with product and design in a fast-paced team.

jobs.title: UI Developer (Contract)
jobs.description: Three-month contract to refresh marketing sites and component libraries. Strong CSS and React skills required.

jobs.title: Node.js Backend Developer
jobs.description: Design and maintain REST APIs, integrate with PostgreSQL and message queues. TypeScript experience a plus.

jobs.title: Part-time React Tutor
jobs.description: Evening sessions teaching React fundamentals and hooks. Great communication skills essential.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: React front end and PHP/Laravel APIs. Work with local SMEs on job portal and fintech products.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Kubernetes, CI/CD, and observability. Partner with engineering teams to harden deployment pipelines.

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.description: Figma systems, user research, and handoff to React developers. Portfolio with SaaS work required.

jobs.title: Junior Web Developer
jobs.description: Grow your career building React dashboards and internal tools. Mentorship and code reviews provided.

jobs.title: QA Automation Engineer
jobs.description: Playwright, API testing, and CI integration. Collaborate with React teams on regression suites.

jobs.title: Technical Writer
jobs.description: Document REST APIs and SDK examples. Familiarity with OpenAPI and developer portals.

jobs.title: Mobile React Native Developer
jobs.description: Patient-facing apps with offline support. Experience bridging native modules with React Native.

jobs.title: Data Engineer
jobs.description: ETL pipelines, dbt, and warehouse modeling. Python and SQL. Partner with analytics on job market datasets.

jobs.title: Security Analyst
jobs.description: Threat modeling and reviews for SaaS platform. OSCP or similar valued.

jobs.title: Engineering Manager
jobs.description: Lead two squads shipping React features. Hiring, performance, and roadmap alignment with leadership.

jobs.title: Support Engineer
jobs.description: Triage tickets, reproduce bugs in React apps, and document workarounds for customers.

jobs.title: Site Reliability Engineer
jobs.description: On-call rotation, SLOs, and incident response for regulated healthcare workloads.

jobs.title: API Developer (PHP)
